title: What is CIDR?
body: Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) is a method for allocating IP addresses and IP routing.

title: What is an AWS Lambda cold start?
body: A cold start occurs when a new Lambda function instance is initialized before handling an invocation.

title: Explain API Gateway integration types.
body: Common types include Lambda proxy, HTTP proxy, and private integrations.

title: What is DynamoDB partition key?
body: The partition key is used to determine the partition (physical node) in which an item is stored.

title: What is CloudFront cache behavior?
body: Cache behaviors let you configure how CloudFront processes requests for different paths.
